vehicles.name: BYD Di3 · SW 13.x
vehicles.description: Di3.0 platform, firmware 13.x — Atto 3 / Yuan Plus (2022-2026). Qualcomm SM6125 (trinket), Android 10.

vehicles.name: BYD Di3 · SW 14.x
vehicles.description: Di3.0 platform, firmware 14.x — updated Atto 3 / Yuan Plus (2024+).

vehicles.name: BYD Di4 · SW 15.x
vehicles.description: Di4.0 platform, firmware 15.x — Seal / Atto 4 / Dolphin Plus.

vehicles.name: BYD Di2 · SW 11.x
vehicles.description: Di2.0 platform, firmware 11.x — older BYD models.

modules.name: BYD Test Module
modules.description: Safe test module — no system changes. Verifies BYD Module Store works on your unit.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: Android Auto
modules.description: Enables Android Auto on BYD Di3 head units. Patched APK with certificate bypass and SSL pinning disabled.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: CarPlay + MFi Hook
modules.description: Enables Apple CarPlay via MFi coprocessor emulation (LD_PRELOAD). Requires donor DI3 unit on same Wi-Fi for signing relay.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: Arabic UI Language Pack
modules.description: Patches 13 system APKs with Arabic RTL translations: AutoVideo, BluetoothPhone, BydBootGuide, CarSetting, Launcher3 and more.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: iFlytek Global Voice Engine
modules.description: Replaces Cerence with iFlytek engine. Supports AR/EN/RU/HI + 7 more. Patches SpeechHMI whitelist (autoType 0xff). Needs ~1.5GB voice data on /data/navi.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: BYD App Store
modules.description: Installs the BydStore APK marketplace for additional BYD-specific applications.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: Google Mobile Services
modules.description: Installs Google Play Services and core GMS packages for apps that depend on Google APIs.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: Signature Spoofing
modules.description: Patches Android framework for signature spoofing. Required by MicroG as Google Play Services replacement.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: OTA Update Bypass
modules.description: Redirects OTA update checks to a local mock server, preventing unwanted firmware updates that may undo your modifications.
modules.author: ashrafnaji
